arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -Wall -Wextra -O0 -g3 -ffreestanding -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -nostdlib -T /home/gavin/tcase_controller/build/STM32F446RETx_FLASH.ld -Wl,-Map=/home/gavin/tcase_controller/build/main.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-e,main CMakeFiles/main.elf.dir/home/gavin/tcase_controller/src/main.c.o -o main.elf
